arguments.query: Firecrawl pricing API access free plan
Firecrawl API key self-serve free signup no credit card required
Firecrawl official MCP server GitHub mendableai firecrawl-mcp

researched_category.notes: Firecrawl provides APIs to scrape, crawl, map, search, and extract structured data from websites, optimized for LLM consumption.

one_liner.value: A web data API that turns websites into clean, LLM-ready markdown/JSON for AI agents — search, scrape, crawl, and extract at scale.

methods.notes: API key passed as Bearer token in Authorization header (e.g., 'Authorization: Bearer fc-123456789'). Keyless free tier also available (rate-limited, no token required).

access.notes: Free plan with 1,000 credits/month available with no credit card required. Sign up via email or GitHub. Keyless free tier also available (no account needed, rate-limited per IP). No paid plan required for API access.

summary.value: Comprehensive public REST API at api.firecrawl.dev with endpoints for scrape, crawl, map, search, extract (structured data via AI), interact (browser automation), agent (autonomous web research), and monitor. Official SDKs for Python and Node.js. Webhook support for async jobs. Full API reference at docs.firecrawl.dev.

agent_interface.notes: Official MCP server at github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl-mcp-server (6903 stars, MIT license). Also available via Composio toolkit. Keyless remote MCP endpoint available. CLI tool (npx firecrawl-cli). Agent onboarding skill at firecrawl.dev/agent-onboarding/SKILL.md.

rationale.value: Firecrawl has a well-documented public REST API, self-serve free tier (no credit card required), official SDKs, an official MCP server, and a keyless free tier for zero-friction onboarding. All signals point to it being immediately buildable into an agent toolkit today.

s1.quote: Power AI agents with clean web data. The complete toolkit to search, scrape, and interact with the web at scale.
s1.title: Firecrawl Homepage

s2.quote: Firecrawl is free for 1,000 pages every month (1,000 free credits per month). No credit card required.
s2.title: Firecrawl Pricing

s3.quote: For authentication, it's required to include an Authorization header. The header should contain Bearer fc-123456789, where fc-123456789 represents your API Key.
s3.title: Firecrawl API Reference - Introduction

s4.quote: Free — $0/month — A lightweight way to get started. No cost, no card, no hassle.
s4.title: Firecrawl Pricing

s5.quote: Is Firecrawl free? Yes, Firecrawl is free for 1,000 pages every month (1,000 free credits per month).
s5.title: Firecrawl Pricing FAQ

s6.quote: All requests contain the following base URL: https://api.firecrawl.dev. Features: Scrape, Parse, Crawl, Map, Search, Extract, Agent, Browser, Monitor.
s6.title: Scrape Endpoint - Firecrawl Docs

s7.quote: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server implementation that integrates Firecrawl for searching, scraping, and interacting with the web. Connect without an API key to get started on the remote keyless free tier.
s7.title: Firecrawl MCP Server

s8.quote: Firecrawl Keyless: Search, scrape, and interact without an API key. Every developer gets 1,000 free credits a month, automatically.
s8.title: Firecrawl Keyless Launch

s9.quote: Official Firecrawl MCP Server - Adds powerful web scraping and search to Cursor, Claude and any other LLM clients. License: MIT. Stars: 6903.
s9.title: firecrawl/firecrawl-mcp-server

s10.quote: Firecrawl automates web crawling and data extraction. Auth: API_KEY. Tools: 30.
s10.title: Firecrawl - Composio Toolkit

s11.quote: Firecrawl helps agents search first, scrape clean content, interact with live pages... CLI tools — firecrawl search, firecrawl scrape, firecrawl interact, firecrawl ask.
s11.title: Firecrawl Agent Onboarding Skill

limitations: Pricing page shows 500 one-time credits from some sources vs 1,000 monthly from the official page — the official pricing page says 1,000 credits/month free. Some third-party blogs reference older 500-credit plans.
The MCP server has a keyless free tier but it's rate-limited and only supports scrape/search/interact without a key.
Free plan has low rate limits and concurrency (2 concurrent requests).
